Entries.CnC_TheMurderBelowBegins: Greetings, young adept.^^ It seems you have formed a fellowship with the call of the forest. One is in need of your help... Enclosed is a totem. Follow it and meet with my confidant...   ^^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard%item quest CnC_Begin%%%action AddItem 7thAxis.CnC_TMBDungeonTotem %%[letterbg 2][#]A Mysterious Letter...
